requires: page_id and paper_uuid from source or upstream packet
section ids from 02_SECTION_MAP if present, else worker-5 fallback section ids
input.format: Machine-readable page/section pass markers with explicit lane status and notes.

output.format: JSON is canonical; CSV is the review/export mirror for workbook alignment.

loopback_conditions: section ids change between reruns without an intentional new artifact identity
ledger status disagrees with workbook append payloads
a downstream lane claims passed while no machine-readable packet exists
